title: Authorization of public officers
content:
The Commissioner may in writing authorize any public officer 
or class of public officer to exercise or perform any or all of 
the powers, functions or duties conferred or imposed on the 
Commissioner under this Ordinance.
(Added 10 of 1980 s. 2)
